title: Gentle Spicy Portuguese Chicken Tagine
description: A tangy and creamy Portuguese dish featuring ras el hanout, perfect for a lazy Sunday, made in a molcajete vessel with a salt bake method for low fat content.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the ras el hanout, salt, and black pepper.
In a large molcajete vessel, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the molcajete and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the molcajete and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the molcajete and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chicken broth and coconut cream to the molcajete, stirring to combine.
Cover the molcajete with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
